# GrindAtlas

> In-depth guides, tier lists, and interactive tools for idle, incremental, and roguelike games.

GrindAtlas publishes data-driven strategy content and free browser-based tools for two of the most-played genres on the web: idle/incremental games and roguelikes.

## Site structure

- [Home](https://www.15115656.xyz/): Latest guides, interactive tools, and games we cover.
- [Idle Games](https://www.15115656.xyz/idle-games/): Strategy guides for Cookie Clicker, Universal Paperclips, and other idle games.
- [Roguelikes](https://www.15115656.xyz/roguelikes/): Tier lists and build guides for Balatro, Hades 2, Slay the Spire 2, and other roguelikes.
- [Tools](https://www.15115656.xyz/tools/): Free browser-based calculators.
- [About](https://www.15115656.xyz/about/): Who we are.
- [Contact](https://www.15115656.xyz/contact/): How to reach us.
- [RSS Feed](https://www.15115656.xyz/rss.xml): Subscribe to new guides.

## Key guides (idle games)

- [Best Idle Games 2026](https://www.15115656.xyz/idle-games/best-idle-games-2026/)
- [Cookie Clicker Strategy Guide](https://www.15115656.xyz/idle-games/cookie-clicker-strategy-guide/)
- [Cookie Clicker Ascension Strategy 2026](https://www.15115656.xyz/idle-games/cookie-clicker-ascension-strategy/)
- [Universal Paperclips Walkthrough](https://www.15115656.xyz/idle-games/universal-paperclips-walkthrough/)

## Key guides (roguelikes)

- [Best Roguelike and Roguelite Games 2026](https://www.15115656.xyz/roguelikes/best-roguelikes-2026/)
- [Balatro Joker Tier List 2026](https://www.15115656.xyz/roguelikes/balatro-joker-tier-list/)
- [Hades 2 Weapon Tier List 2026](https://www.15115656.xyz/roguelikes/hades-2-weapon-tier-list/)
- [Slay the Spire 2 Best Starter Builds 2026](https://www.15115656.xyz/roguelikes/slay-the-spire-2-starter-builds/)

## Interactive tools

- [Idle Progression Calculator](https://www.15115656.xyz/tools/idle-progression-calculator/)
- [Cookie Clicker Building Optimizer](https://www.15115656.xyz/tools/cookie-clicker-optimizer/)
- [Idle Prestige Calculator](https://www.15115656.xyz/tools/idle-prestige-calculator/)

## What this site is NOT

- Not affiliated with any of the game developers mentioned.
- Not a game aggregator or storefront. We do not sell games.
